scripts.dev:server: concurrently -n gw,auth,goals,habits,finance,journal,vault -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,gray "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:goals" "npm run dev:habits" "npm run dev:finance" "npm run dev:journal" "npm run dev:vault"
